name: Mafia Merge
author: Poki
description: Mafia Merge is a merge game where adorable mafia goons turn coin-bouncing into big business! Place your little mobsters on the grid, merge two of the same type to create stronger, richer versions, and generate piles of cash as they bounce coins around. Strategically build your mafia empire, unlock new characters, and climb the family tree of power. Can you collect them all and become the ultimate mafia boss? How to play Mafia Merge? Click or tap to select the item. Click and hold to merge. Who created Mafia Merge? Mafia Merge is created by CHEPERGame. Play their other games on Poki: Elemental Master ! How can I play Mafia Merge for free? You can play Mafia Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Mafia Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Mafia Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
